title: Alpha Engine Report Card (evaluator RC v2 contract, v1)
description: Evaluator-slot output contract: written each grading cycle by the evaluator to evaluator/{date}/report_card.json; consumed by the dashboard (System Report Card + 9-tile MetricRecord substrate) and the substrate/board surfaces. v1 codifies the shape emitted by grading/aggregate.py::build_report_card (compute_scorecard base keys status/overall/research/predictor/executor + the aggregate-attached tiles/tiles_overall_status/_provenance), filed as the report_card boundary of the 2026-07-11 module-seam scorecard audit (config#2343, sibling of config#692; parent epic config#2327). Evolution is ADDITIVE-ONLY per the S3 Contract Safety rule: new optional fields may appear at any time (additionalProperties stays true); removing or renaming a required field is a breaking change requiring a v2 schema + dual-write window.

schema_version.description: Contract version stamp. NEW required field on the write-contract (config#2343); historical cards written before the producer stamp are grandfathered on READ by tolerant consumers but are NOT valid against this write-contract.

status.description: Build status: 'ok' all inputs present; 'partial' some artifacts absent; 'insufficient_data' too little to grade

overall.description: System-level v1 letter grade (distinct from tiles_overall_status)

research.description: Research-module v1 grade + component breakdown (scanner, sector_teams, macro_agent, cio, composite_scoring, ...)

predictor.description: Predictor-module v1 grade + component breakdown (meta_model, veto_gate)

executor.description: Executor-module v1 grade + component breakdown (entry_triggers, risk_guard, exit_rules, position_sizing, portfolio, ...)

tiles.description: RC v2 MetricRecord tiles keyed by tile name (portfolio_outcome, predictor, research, executor, backtester, substrate, agent, behavioral, director_quality). Each value carries at minimum a 'status' the overall_status roll-up reads.

tiles_overall_status.description: Worst-of roll-up over the tiles' statuses (module_agg.overall_status); e.g. GREEN | WATCH | RED | N/A-NOT-RUN

artifacts.description: Artifact-read audit: n_read / n_missing + read/missing key lists

_provenance.description: Build provenance stamped by aggregate.py (run_date, grader_source, artifact-read audit)

grade.description: Numeric 0-100 grade; null when the module could not be graded this cycle

letter.description: Letter grade derived from grade (A/B/C/D/F, or N/A when grade is null)

grade.description: Module composite 0-100 grade; null when ungradable this cycle

letter.description: Module letter grade (N/A when grade is null)

components.description: Per-component breakdown; each value is a {grade, letter, ...} block or a list of such blocks (sector_teams). Component membership varies by cycle and evolves additively.

status.description: Tile status the overall_status roll-up reads (e.g. GREEN | WATCH | RED | N/A-NOT-RUN)

tile.description: A MetricRecord tile. Only 'status' is contractually required (the roll-up dereferences it); the full MetricRecord field set (value, ci_low, ci_high, n_samples, target, red_line, trend_4w, estimator, criticality, ...) rides as additive optional fields.
